# init(rawValue:)

**Initializer**

Creates a new context with the given value of the underlying type.

## Declaration

```swift
init?(rawValue: Int)
```

## Parameters

- **rawValue**: An integer that’s the raw value of the enumeration.
title: init(rawValue:)
